creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Created attachment 227914
0001-net-p2p-bazarr-devel-Update-to-0.9.10-beta.2.patch

Updated to 0.9.10-beta.2
Added DIST_SUBDIR so bazarr and bazarr-devel distfiles can coexist

Changes in bazarr from 0.9.9 to 0.9.10-beta.2:
- Fixed Ktuvit provider login
- Fixed Addic7ed AttributeError exception with some movies

poudriere etc ok, runtest ok.
